summary: The notebook contains two notes: a foundations-level guide to gradient descent and a structured reading of the Transformer paper.

areas.label: Machine Learning
areas.coverage: One course note covers gradient descent: the update rule, a one-step quadratic example, and learning-rate failure modes.
areas.gap: Broader ML foundations such as linear models, regularization, and other optimizers are not yet present.

areas.label: Deep Learning
areas.coverage: A reading note explains the Transformer's self-attention, multi-head attention, positional encodings, and WMT 2014 results.
areas.gap: No notes yet on newer architectures, sub-quadratic attention, or training-stability and scaling recipes.
